content: Implement a minimal first-day TYF book-start path: create and open a work, create author-owned source/interview prompts, capture provenance-safe source/voice/claim/question notes, never write manuscript content except through tyf write --confirm, and make the repo valid as a Codex plugin for immediate Codex use. {kind=FRe, subject=tyf.first-day-writing-path, value=source-first-codex-plugin, surface=Codex session 2026-06-21}

TYF should be maximally transparent like SOLO: expose its reflexes and hook behavior clearly, and support explicit git recovery snapshots for book-writing workspaces without silently committing or hiding changes from the author. {kind=FRe, subject=tyf.transparent-reflexes-git, value=visible-hooks-explicit-snapshot, surface=Codex session 2026-06-21}
